transcript: Speaker A: ಏನ್ ಮಾಡ್ತಿದ್ದೀರಾ? [What are you doing?] Hi Husband Watching. Speaker B: Hi... "husband watching" ಅಲ್ಲ... "I am keeping a watch on my husband" ಅಂತ ಹೇಳ್ಬೇಕು. [Hi... not "husband watching"... you should say "I am keeping a watch on my husband".] Speaker A: ಸರಿ ಸರಿ. ನನಗೆ English ಕಲಿಸ್ತೀಯಾ? [Okay okay. Will you teach me English?] Speaker B: ಖಂಡಿತ. ದಿನಕ್ಕೆ ನನ್ನ ಜೊತೆ ಬರಿ 15 ನಿಮಿಷ ಕನ್ನಡದಲ್ಲೇ ಮಾತಾಡ್ತಾ English ಕಲಿಬಹುದು. [Sure. Just 15 minutes a day with me, speaking in Kannada, you can learn English.] Speaker A: Okay, but ನೀನ್ ಜಾಸ್ತಿ charge ಮಾಡ್ತೀಯಾ? [Okay, but do you charge a lot?] Speaker B: ಇಲ್ಲ ಮೇಡಂ, ನೀವು ಬರಿ 1 ರೂಪಾಯಿಯಿಂದ ಶುರು ಮಾಡಬಹುದು. ಅದಕ್ಕೆ 1 ಕೋಟಿ ಜನ ದಿನ ನನ್ನ ಬಳಿ English ಕಲಿತಿದ್ದಾರೆ. [No madam, you can start with just 1 rupee. That's why 1 crore people learn English with me daily.] Speaker A: Super, ಹೇಗೆ join ಆಗೋದು? [Super, how to join?] Speaker B: ಕೆಳಗಿರೋ install button ಒತ್ತಿ, MySivi app install ಮಾಡಿ, ನಿಮ್ಮ English practice ಶುರು ಮಾಡಿ. [Press the install button below, install MySivi app, and start your English practice.] Speaker C: Click on install now and download MySivi app.
on_screen_text:
ಏನ್ ಮಾಡ್ತಿದ್ದೀರಾ [What are you doing?]
Hi Husband Watching
Hi... "husband Watching" ಅಲ್ಲ... [Hi... not "husband watching"...]
"i Am Keeping A Watch On My Husband" ಅಂತ ಹೇಳ್ಬೇಕು [you should say "I am keeping a watch on my husband"]
ಸರಿ ಸರಿ [Okay okay]
ನನಗೆ English ಕಲಿಸ್ತೀಯಾ [Will you teach me English?]
ಖಂಡಿತ [Sure]
ದಿನಕ್ಕೆ ನನ್ನ ಜೊತೆ ಬರಿ 15 ನಿಮಿಷ [Just 15 minutes a day with me]
ಕನ್ನಡದಲ್ಲೇ ಮಾತಾಡುತ್ತಾ [speaking in Kannada]
English ಕಲಿಬಹುದು [you can learn English]
But ನೀನ್ ಜಾಸ್ತಿ charge ಮಾಡ್ತೀಯಾ [But do you charge a lot?]
ಇಲ್ಲ ಮೇಡಂ [No madam]
ನೀವು ಬರಿ 1 ರೂಪಾಯಿಯಿಂದ ಶುರು ಮಾಡಬಹುದು [you can start with just 1 rupee]
3 Dinakke Offer ₹30 ₹1 [3 Days Offer ₹30 ₹1]
Nantara ₹299/month [Afterwards ₹299/month]
1 CRORES+ PEOPLE
ದಿನ ನನ್ನ ಬಳಿ English ಕಲಿತಿದ್ದಾರೆ [have learned English with me daily]
ಹೇಗೆ Join ಆಗೋದು [How to join?]
INSTALL
MySivi INSTALL
ನಿಮ್ಮ English practice ಶುರು ಮಾಡಿ [Start your English practice]
MySivi English speaking app Install Now
summary: A Kannada-speaking woman attempts to speak English but makes a grammatical error, which is corrected by an AI robot avatar. The AI explains that users can practice English for 15 minutes daily starting at just ₹1. The ad concludes with a call to action to install the MySivi app.
